name: Bane
description: I dreamt a field of war...and woke to find myself upon it. Atropos, the Bane When the gods have nightmares, it is Bane Elemental who brings them.

abilities.name: Ichor of Nyctasha
abilities.description: Applies a permanent status resistance reduction debuff stack on the dying enemy hero. The status resistance reduction is only applied to debuff sourced to Bane.

abilities.name: Enfeeble
abilities.description: Deals damage per second while reducing the affected enemy unit's total attack damage and cast range. Each tendril of fear that Atropos weaves increases the vulnerability of his victims to arcane and unknown arts.

abilities.name: Brain Sap
abilities.description: Feasts on the vital energies of an enemy unit, self-heals and deals pure damage. Atropos finds no greater pleasure than to harvest the fear he creates.

abilities.name: Nightmare
abilities.description: Grants a brief invulnerability moment to the affected unit both upon debuff application and per debuff application.

abilities.name: Fiend's Grip
abilities.description: Grants a brief invulnerability moment to the affected unit both upon debuff application and per debuff application. These illusions are uncontrollable, receives additional incoming damage, and are instant killed upon being interrupted.
